title: Adding Meta Pixel To Snyder Site
description:
Seeking help add the metapixel from the client please.
https://snyderac.com/

Here are the script and steps they provided:
 
Install Meta Pixel on your website
The Meta Pixel is a piece of code that you add to your website by copying the base code below and pasting it into the header section of your website.


1. Copy base code
Copy the Meta Pixel base code below.
<!-- Meta Pixel Code -->
<script>
!function(f,b,e,v,n,t,s)
{if(f.fbq)return;n=f.fbq=function(){n.callMethod?
n.callMethod.apply(n,arguments):n.queue.push(arguments)};
if(!f._fbq)f._fbq=n;n.push=n;n.loaded=!0;n.version='2.0';
n.queue=[];t=b.createElement(e);t.async=!0;
t.src=v;s=b.getElementsByTagName(e)[0];
s.parentNode.insertBefore(t,s)}(window, document,'script',
'https://connect.facebook.net/en_US/fbevents.js');
fbq('init', '1602864097646186');
fbq('track', 'PageView');
</script>
<noscript><img height="1" width="1" style="display:none"
src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1602864097646186&ev=PageView&noscript=1"
/></noscript>
<!-- End Meta Pixel Code -->

2. Paste base code to website
Paste the Meta Pixel code between the <head> and </head> tags of your web page. You may already have other existing code between the head tags, so just place the pixel code underneath that, but above </head>. Install the base code on every page of your website. See more detailed instructions

3. Save website code changes
Before returning to this screen, refresh your website to save and confirm the changes you made to your website's code.

 ----
Thanks much!

title: Update schedule script on site
description:
Hi, this is inline w/ the discussion: Update Scheduler  - J301 SnyderAC

Client would like to update their scheduler script on the site. For their Book Now button.
https://snyderac.com/

As per client: they created an updated scheduler to be used on the Snyder to go on the ‘Book Now’ buttons. This scheduler is location agnostic, meaning that it does not need to be different based on the location selector. Once a user puts their zip code into the scheduler, it will direct them to the appropriate North/South Tenant. 

The script information is below, the old script needs to be replaced or removed for the new to work:
 
<script
  data-router-id="router_buljbmtiohzg7ry3tei0wmk8"
  defer
  id="se-widget-embed"
  src="https://embed.scheduler.servicetitan.com/scheduler-v1.js"
></script>
 
<button
  onclick="_scheduler.show()"
  type="button">
  Book Now!
</button>
 
 
Linked below is a test link to show you what the new scheduler should look like to ensure it is created correctly.
https://scheduler.servicetitan.com/router/router_buljbmtiohzg7ry3tei0wmk8?inlineMode=true

title: Website change requests...
assignees: Chris Traynor, Clayton Coombs, Keith Bruss
description:
Quite considerable changes to the website requested here from Snyder. Let's all four of us get on a call to discuss this. I can deal with the SoW request in part 2 of the email...

-------------

Hi, Chris and team; I hope you are all doing well.

As we discussed last time when we discussed website changes and how to improve the Snyder experience for customers in the North and South, and as you requested, here is the list of changes/action items we need to scope out to achieve what we consider would get us closer to an ideal customer experience stage.

Some of these items have higher priority, so that is something we can discuss once you confirm this is all possible and we get a SOW.

In the spirit of transparency, please let us know if these changes are feasible and, with the scope, provide us with a timeline of execution.

Last but not least, we would like some more clarity on the current scope of work and more details on the amount of content we can produce on a monthly basis, this can be in work hours*, words, pages*, deliverables, etc - but something that details what can we request/plan each month with you. *If it's hours, please specify what kind of deliverables can be achieved on average within a working hour, if it's pages, what the specifications of such pages are, etc.

Please let me know if you have any questions or require any clarification! Hopefully, we can have a scope of work quoted that we can review in our next call.

Thanks in advance and have a great weekend!

Best,
Elvis Quintero El Yordi
Marketing Manager – South Florida
941-299-2559 - elvis.yordi@teamsoutheast.com

ATTACHMENT...

 
 
UI/UX:

  • Ensure Auto IP-Detection works as intended, when user visits they are presented with a pop-up to validate they are on the Snyder south/north region and they are prompted to change with two images side to side with the North and South maps with the corresponding counties for each shaded in the Snyder blue. (Considerable amount of work and definitely out of scope)

  • On the main categories (electrical, drains, cooling, etc.) Add tiles for the subcategories right after the hero image for easier navigation. 
    • When navigating electrical, the tiles would be the electrical sub-categories. When navigating plumbing, the tiles would be plumbing sub-categories, etc. (Not entirely sure what they mean here. Tiles on the actual pages of subcategories after the header image?)

  • Main Navigation: 
    • If browsing in the South region, remove "Heating" and "Generators" from Mega Menu. These are not relevant for the market. (Different menus per location? A lot of work and out of scope. Possible not even desirable from an SEO point of view.)
    • Combine Cooling & Heating to clean up redundancy and improve UX for the North region. (I don't think this is a good idea. Discuss)
    • Remove Contact subcategories from Mega Menu. Leave it as just a button that leads to Contact Us. (Not normally done since users look in the menu for the contact page but worthy of discussion)
       
      • Add a basic Contact Form with captcha. (New direction for Snyder. (This will need to be approved by Shawn I think)
    •  
      • Remove the rest of the subcategories since its redundant with About Us (i.e., Careers) (I don't know what they're thinking about here. Not a good idea)
    •  
      • Move “24/7 Emergency Service” page to About. (Hmmmm, maybe duplicate the link to there. I don't think it's a good idea to just move it.)
    •  
  • Move up the “Where you’ll find Snyder” section in the home page – up. Right below offers. (Hmmm, not good for SEO)
  • The following pages should be dynamic to each region (north/south). By dynamic, we should be able to provide different content depending on the region as offers and some services will vary. (So they basically want two different sites)
     
    • Home Page (Hero Image, Different “Where you’ll find Snyder” section, and other content.
  •  
    • Offer page  

    • Maintenance Plan 

    • About Us/History (South needs context for the southeast added to it) 

    • Service Area
  •  
    • Our Service Reviews
  •  
    • Careers
  •  
    • Within each main category (cooling, electrical, plumbing, generators, etc.), offers should be “dynamic” or accurate depending on the region (north/south)
  •  
    • 24/7 Emergency Service
  •  
    • Counties and Cities 

  • Hero Images for the Home Page and main categories (Cooling/Cooling & Heating, Plumbing, Drains, Electrical, Generators, Contact, About) should have the possibility to be dynamic and change depending on the region (north/south).
  • Add "Buy Filters" button next to the Book Now button in the Hero Image (Home Page) (Do we have a shop on the site with filters?)

PPC Attribution & Tracking

·      PPC Pages should lead to its corresponding category/subcategory based on the campaign strategy.

o   Current state has PPC completely isolated in its own folders making us constantly lose campaign attribution. For example: https://snyderac.com/south-ppc/plumbing-services/water-heater-repair/
 
·      Phone numbers should dynamically stick throughout the user’s experience when they come from a paid channel, i.e., PPC. (WhatConverts can do this - we have spoken to them about it)
 
·      Contact Form should fire tags based on user source/medium, so we can track conversions accordingly. (I think we have code that can do this - but of course, no forms. Maybe he's talking about PPC forms, which we're not in control of?)

·      CapacityPRO Integration to dynamically change offers and copy on the website based on our operational capacity. (CapacityPRO appears to be a CampDigital brand)

o   More from partnering with Camp Digital on this. (Yes I think all of this section looks like something they should take up with CampDigital?)

Content:

  • Main Headers/Hero texts: Add shadow for readability. (Needs new font then)
  • Headers/Hero Text need improved spacing between letters and shadows for better readability.  (Needs new font then)
  • Hero images need to change and update more between the categories/sub categories, this creates a diverse journey that reinforces distinction between pages. (We've been through this with Shawn - they need to supply us with these images)
  • All content on the non-local pages to be Florida oriented, not Jacksonville or South oriented. 
    • Complete consistency across all main categories and subcategories with "Florida" w/o any distinction of locality. (SEO need to discuss this. We've been over it quite a few times with tis new team.)

  • All URL structures need to match Florida and not favor one location or the other. (SEO need to discuss this. We've been over it quite a few times with tis new team.)
  • Schemas, image tags, ALT tags, also need to be broad to Florida and not favor one location or the other. (SEO need to discuss this. We've been over it quite a few times with tis new team.)
  • Incorporate Snyderman throughout the site.
     
    • We can expand more on this item, but this means including the photos we have of him through the experience and design as it makes sense in the trade categories. We have lots of photos and content available. (We need all of these photos and instructions on exactly which pages to add them to)
  •  
  • About Service area and Local Pages:
     
    • Depending on the region being browsed, the county/city list should move up, Hero Image & Headers should be different and the region the user is browsing should be prioritized. (Complete change of direction)
  •  
    • Add video to About Us and Brand “Welcome” Pages. (Something we can do!)
       
      • https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JG69rS8KBL8
    •  
      • Ex of Welcome Page: https://snyderac.com/welcome-air-temp/


    • Need to complete all cities to strengthen local SEO. (SEO question)
  •  
    • All local pages should have internal links leading to the main categories or subcategories as appropriate following internal linking best practices. (SEO question, possibly use breadcrumbs?)
  •  
    • Within the county local pages, we need a template for the team that serves that area, this can be a sub-page of the county pages for additional depth to Google. (Not quite sure what this means, maybe bring into this?)
  •  

  • Footer: 

  • Locations need to be clickable. (Can do!)
  • North Florida & South Florida should lead to their own Service Area Pages which are subpages of Service Area. (Again, two different sites)
  • Maintain GMAP miniature should match the location the user is browsing.  (Current state) (Maps swap - not already doing this?)

Blog:

·      What is the current scope for blog?

·      Add Author pages for each region so each blog entry as a “subject matter expert” and adds a face to these blogs  – Snyder to provide base biographies. (I suppose we could do this. SEO implications?)

·      Community Engagement news/articles should be dynamic depending on the user’s region. (Out of scope)

o   Hide north efforts in the south page and viceversa. (Out of scope)

·      Keyword-dense articles that help boost local presence of both regions (separate blog posts). (SEO question)

·      Snyderman “Tips” as a monthly series (2 per month). (Fine, if they supply us with content we can post it)

·      Overall we are thinking 1-2 blog entries per week. (not inclusive of Community Engagement) [Need to understand current scope] (SEO question)


Mobile 

  • Ensure the above changes are mobile friendly. (Of course)

title: Update Scheduler
description:
Hi this is a query for now. 

We got a ticket from the client asking to update their scheduler script on the site. For their Book Now button.

As per client: they created an updated scheduler to be used on the Snyder to go on the ‘Book Now’ buttons. This scheduler is location agnostic, meaning that it does not need to be different based on the location selector. Once a user puts their zip code into the scheduler, it will direct them to the appropriate North/South Tenant. 

The script information is below, the old script needs to be replaced or removed for the new to work:
 
<script
  data-router-id="router_buljbmtiohzg7ry3tei0wmk8"
  defer
  id="se-widget-embed"
  src="https://embed.scheduler.servicetitan.com/scheduler-v1.js"
></script>
 
<button
  onclick="_scheduler.show()"
  type="button">
  Book Now!
</button>
 
 
Linked below is a test link to show you what the new scheduler should look like to ensure it is created correctly.
https://scheduler.servicetitan.com/router/router_buljbmtiohzg7ry3tei0wmk8?inlineMode=true

Thank you for your time yesterday. Please provide us with a quote to help assist the transition of these websites into Snyder.

Air America - https://airamericaac.com/

  • Blue Corona or you to create a pop-up to announce the website phasing out.
    • This pop up should "block" access to other pages in the site and lead users to the Snyder site (homepage). 
    • This pop-up is short-lived so the sooner we could get it up and running the better.
  • Need a 301 plan for main pages to Snyder.
  • Content ownership to be confirmed.
Air Temp - https://airtempairconditioning.com/
  • Currently hosted by you (Clixsy).
  • The goal is to phase out this website by EOY 2024.
  • We need to create a pop-up to announce the website phasing out.
    • This pop up should "block" access to other pages in the site and lead users to the Snyder site (homepage). 
    • This pop-up is short-lived so the sooner we could get it up and running the better.
  • Need to share 301 plan from JDPP.
Phoenix - https://phoenixairllc.com/
  • Currently hosted by MT360.
  • We need to implement a 301 plan to Snyder by EOY 2024.
  • No need for pop-up.
  • Content ownership to be confirmed.
Palm Air - https://www.palmairac.com/
